caption: A man with a distinctive, tall, silver-colored hairstyle and glasses is seated in a room filled with framed pictures and clothing racks. He wears a white button-down shirt with suspenders and a small bow tie, and he has over-ear headphones on. A professional microphone is positioned in front of him. The background includes various photos and a "LEE" branded garment. On-screen text displays "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" alongside a microphone icon. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, with his facial expressions shifting slightly as he talks. His mouth opens and closes, and he looks downward and then slightly upward, while the background and equipment remain static. The visual layout remains consistent throughout, focusing on the man's upper body as he engages in a conversation.
